entry.title: New: Resolution 2026-02 (Kauaʻi) — On agenda 2026-02-04
entry.content:
RESOLUTION CONFIRMING MAYORAL APPOINTMENT TO THE FIRE COMMISSION (Jennie Lynne Chahanovich) Proposed Draft Bill (No. 2969) – A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING CHAPTER 8, ARTICLE 27, KAUA‘I COUNTY CODE 1987, AS AMENDED, RELATING TO SHORELINE SETBACK AND COASTAL PROTECTION (Referred to the Planning Commission on July 16, 2025) Proposed Draft Bill (No. 2981) – A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING CHAPTER

Latest action: On agenda 2026-02-04

View on the council site
